$description: Dark mode — STUB (Phase 0). Overrides the semantic layer only, and re-points it exclusively at primitives that already exist. No new colors are invented and no brand value is touched. Phase 1 replaces this with a properly designed dark palette (real raised-surface and border neutrals, plus status colors re-tuned for dark backgrounds).

surface.$description: STUB: flat with page. Needs a raised dark neutral in Phase 1.

subtle.$description: STUB: zebra/hover. Stronger than it should be; needs a dark neutral in Phase 1.
